items.summary:
Press freedom has fallen to its lowest level in 25 years. That warning comes from Reporters Without Borders — also known as RSF — which released its annual index ahead of World Press Freedom Day this Sunday.

To mark the occasion, one of RSF’s partners, Cartooning for Peace, has released a series of short animated films based on cartoons by three artists from its global network, including work by Russian cartoonist Mikhail Zlatkovsky, Canadian cartoonist Serge Chapleau Coté, and Turkish artist Z

items.title: Ukrainian elderly woman rescued using robotic vehicle
items.summary:
Ukrainian forces have attacked two tankers from Russia’s so-called shadow fleet at the entrance to the Port of Novorossiysk on the Black Sea. The announcement was made by Volodymyr Zelenskyy on the Telegram messaging app. He added that Ukraine would continue to use long-range weapons to strike targets at sea, on land and in the air. Meanwhile, in the Donetsk Oblast, an elderly woman was rescued using an unmanned ground vehicle.

Gabrielle Nadler has the story.

items.title: Inflation surging past 50% in Iran
items.summary:
The fragile ceasefire may have paused the fighting, but the economic fallout in Iran continues. A US naval blockade of Iranian ports has sharply reduced the Iran’s oil exports, while the cost of everyday goods has continued to rise. Across the country, people are now bracing for further price increases and growing job losses.

Liza Kaminov reports.

items.title: Iranian Nobel laureate Narges Mohammadi hospitalised
items.summary:
Iran’s imprisoned Nobel Peace Prize laureate, Narges Mohammadi, has been urgently transferred from prison to hospital after what her foundation described as a severe deterioration in her health.

She reportedly fainted twice on Friday. The incident follows a suspected heart attack in late March, raising growing concern among her supporters over her worsening condition.

items.title: New Iranian proposal to end the war under examination
items.summary: A senior Iranian officer on Saturday said that fresh fighting with the United States is “likely”, underscoring rising tensions after President Donald Trump dismissed Tehran’s latest negotiating proposal and issued fresh threats to attack the country. Daniel Quinlan reports.

items.title: Two foreign activists seized from Gaza aid flotilla appear before Israeli court
items.summary: Spanish national Saif Abu Keshek and Brazilian Thiago Avila were brought before an Israeli court Sunday after Israeli troops seized them from a flotilla attempting to bring humanitarian aid to the besieged Gaza Strip. Avila told his lawyers that he had been beaten so badly in Israeli custody that he passed out twice.

items.title: 'We cannot give up': Hong Kong journalists navigate fear, surveillance and shrinking space
items.summary: Hong Kong’s government on Friday slammed foreign media and press freedom groups, rejecting claims of a crackdown on press freedom as “slander” after jailed media tycoon Jimmy Lai was awarded a free speech prize in Germany. Press freedom in the city has sharply declined since a 2020 National Security Law clamped down on dissent. Journalists face visa denials, surveillance, self-censorship and legal threats, while independent outlets struggle to survive.

items.title: Middle East war live: Trump says he 'can't imagine' Iran's latest peace plan is acceptable
items.summary: US President Donald Trump said Saturday he was going to review a new Iranian peace proposal but said he doubted it would be acceptable, saying that Tehran had "not yet paid a big enough price".  Trump’s comments came after Iran's Tasnim and Fars news agencies said Tehran had submitted a 14-point proposal to mediator Pakistan. Follow our liveblog for all the latest updates.

translation.summary: Two women died during an attempt to cross the Channel to join the UK on Sunday morning off Neufchatel-Hardelot (Pas-de-calais), the third such tragedy in the region in just over a month.

translation.summary: Interior Minister Laurent Nuñez is scheduled to visit the Teknival site on a military field near Bourges on Sunday. Between 17,000 and 40,000 people participate in this illegal techno festival, without any major incident reported.

items.title: La victoire du Front Populaire, sociale et antifasciste, "moment unique" dans l'histoire française
items.summary: Le 3 mai 1936, le Front populaire, une coalition des forces de gauche, remportait les élections législatives en France. Dans son sillage, un large mouvement de grève était lancé entraînant l'instauration d'importantes réformes sociales. Quatre-vingt-dix ans plus tard, cette victoire reste une des références majeures de la gauche.

translation.title: The victory of the Popular, Social and Anti-Fascist Front, "unique moment" in French history
translation.summary: On 3 May 1936, the Popular Front, a coalition of left-wing forces, won the legislative elections in France. In its wake, a large-scale strike movement was launched leading to major social reforms. Ninety years later, this victory remains one of the major references of the left.

L'armée israélienne a exhorté les habitants du sud du Liban à évacuer la région alors que les opérations contre le Hezbollah se poursuivent. Suivez notre direct.

items.title: La justice militaire malienne ouvre une enquête suite aux attaques du 25 avril

translation.title: Malian military justice opens investigation following 25 April attacks
translation.summary: In Mali, military justice announced that an investigation had been opened following the terrorist attacks on 25 April, which targeted several Malian army positions, including in Bamako and Kati.

items.title: Charif Majdalani: "la tension est extrême, la population libanaise est au bord de la rupture"
items.summary: Toujours pas de répit pour le Liban. Les frappes israéliennes se poursuivent quotidiennement contre le Hezbollah, faisant sans cesse plus de victimes civiles. Des dizaines de villages du Sud Liban ont reçu l'ordre d'évacuer; Israël mène dans la zone une politique de la "terre brûlée". La population libanaise, déjà très éprouvée par les événements de ces dernières années, est épuisée. L'écrivain Charif Majdalani était l'Invité d'Au Cœur de l'Info, il livre un témoignage poignant depuis Beyrouth.

translation.title: Sharif Majdalani: "The tension is extreme, the Lebanese population is at the edge of the rupture"
translation.summary: Still no respite for Lebanon. Israeli strikes continue daily against Hezbollah, killing more civilians. Dozens of villages in southern Lebanon were ordered to evacuate; Israel is pursuing a "burnt land" policy in the area. The Lebanese population, which has already been severely affected by the events of recent years, is exhausted. The writer Charif Majdalani was the Invity of the Heart of Info, he delivers a poignant testimony from Beirut.

items.title: Antoine Glaser : "La perte de Kidal est énorme, la ville légitimait le pouvoir" au Mali
items.summary: Treize ans après l'opération Serval qui avait permis, en coordination avec les troupes maliennes, de stopper l'avancée des forces djihadistes en direction de Bamako, le Mali a subi une offensive sans précédent du Groupe de soutien à l'islam et aux musulmans (Jnim), et de leur alliés indépendantistes du Front de Libération de l'Azawad. Le pays est-il sur le point de basculer ? Le journaliste Antoine Glaser, spécialiste du continent africain, était l'invité d'Au Cœur de l'Info.

translation.title: Antoine Glaser: "The loss of Kidal is huge, the city legitimized power" in Mali
translation.summary: Thirteen years after Operation Serval, which had allowed, in coordination with Malian troops, to stop the advance of the jihadist forces towards Bamako, Mali underwent an unprecedented offensive by the Islamic and Muslim Support Group (Jnim) and their independent allies of the Azawad Liberation Front. Is the country about to tip? Journalist Antoine Glaser, a specialist on the African continent, was the guest of Au Coeur de l'Info.

items.title: Israël détient deux militants de la "Flottille pour Gaza" interceptée au large de la Grèce

Parmi les 175 militants arrêtés jeudi au large des côtes grecques, ils sont les seuls à ne pas avoir été relâchés. L'Espagne, dont est originaire un des deux hommes, a qualifié la décision israélienne de "complètement illégale".

translation.title: Israel holds two militants of the "Flotilla for Gaza" intercepted off Greece
translation.summary: Two pro-Palestinian activists, who were on board humanitarian ships on their way to Gaza, were taken to Israel on Saturday to be interrogated. Of the 175 activists arrested on Thursday off the Greek coast, they are the only ones not released. Spain, from which one of the two men came, described the Israeli decision as "completely illegal".

items.title: 镜观·足迹｜呵护千山万水 擘画永续发展

items.title: 学习手记 | “环境就是民生”

translation.summary: 5 June is World Environment Day and the environmental day established by our environmental protection laws. Twenty-two years ago, with the deployment of Xi Jinping, then Secretary-General of Zhejiang Province, the “millions of projects” focusing on the environmental rehabilitation of rural settlements were launched. At that time, Comrade Xi had been the secretary of the Zhejiang province for more than six months and had been working for a long time. Why does he focus on the rehabilitation of the rural habitat environment? At the grass-roots level, Comrade Xi found that while the Zhejiang economy was growing rapidly, the rural areas were faced with “growth problems” and the villages were less than satisfactory. Out of 34,000 villages in the province, only 4,000 have a better habitat. It was described as “a village after a village, which is full of garbage”. And the farmers described it as: “Getting up early and making money, counting it in the trash, spending it in the hospital.” It can be said that the remediation of the habitat environment was an urgent aspiration of the rural population of Zhejiang at the time. The fact that millions of projects focus on small problems such as what villages to follow and how to deal with animal and animal dung is a matter of life for the farmers. items.title: 韩正会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 6月5日，国家副主席韩正在北京会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团。 韩正表示，中美关系是当今世界最重要的双边关系之一。当前，中美关系处于关键历史节点。中美相互尊重、和平共处、合作共赢，不仅有利于两国，也有利于世界和平与发展。希望中美高级别二轨对话能不断汇聚两国有识之士的真知灼见，增进美国各界对中国的了解和理解，共同推动中美关系稳定、健康、可持续发展。 美方表示，美中高级别二轨对话有助于双方更好理解对方，为两国关系发展提供更多有益思路。中国经济发展令人钦佩，双方应加强贸易、投资等领域对话合作。

translation.title: Han is meeting with the United States delegation to the High-level Second Track Dialogue between China and the United States
translation.summary: On 5 June, the Vice-President of Xinhua, Han, met in Beijing with the United States delegation to the High-level Second Track Dialogue between China and the United States. Han is saying that Chinese-American relations are one of the most important bilateral relations in the world today. Currently, US-China relations are at a critical historical node. Mutual respect, peaceful coexistence and co-operation between China and the United States are beneficial not only to both countries but also to world peace and development. It is to be hoped that the high-level second-track dialogue between China and the United States will continue to bring together the insights of knowledgeable people from the two countries, enhance understanding and understanding of China among the United States, and work together to promote stable, healthy and sustainable relations between China and the United States. The United States side stated that the two sides would benefit from a better understanding of each other and from more useful ideas for the development of their relations. China ' s economic development was admirable, and the two sides should strengthen dialogue and cooperation in the areas of trade and investment.

items.title: 国务院印发《关于开展第四次全国农业普查的通知》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电　国务院日前印发《关于开展第四次全国农业普查的通知》（以下简称《通知》）。根据《中华人民共和国统计法》和《全国农业普查条例》规定，国务院决定于2026年开展第四次全国农业普查。 　　《通知》强调，第四次全国农业普查是在以中国式现代化全面推进中华民族伟大复兴的新征程上开展的一项重大国情国力调查，要以习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想为指导，深入贯彻党的二十大和二十届二中、三中全会精神，认真落实党中央、国务院决策部署，坚持依法普查、科学普查、为民普查，坚持实事求是、守正创新，全面摸清新时代我国“三农”家底，客观反映农业发展新情况、乡村建设新面貌、农民生活新变化、农村改革新成效。 　　《通知》指出，第四次全国农业普查的对象是在中华人民共和国境内的农村住户，包括农村农业生产经营户和其他住户；城镇农业生产经营户；农业生产经营单位；村民委员会；乡镇人民政府。普查的主要内容包括农业生产条件、粮食和大食物生产情况、农业新质生产力情况、乡村发展基本情况、农村居民生活情况等。普查的标准时点为2026年12月31日24时，时期资料为2026年年度资料。 　　《通知》要求，各地区、各部门要按

translation.title: Circular on the conduct of the Fourth National Agricultural Census issued by the State Council
translation.summary: Xinhua News Service, Beijing, 5 June In accordance with the Statistical Law of the People ' s Republic of China and the Regulations on the National Agricultural Census, the State Council decided to conduct the Fourth National Agricultural Census in 2026. The Circular stressed that the Fourth National Agricultural Census was a major national survey on the new quest for a comprehensive revival of the Chinese nation through China's modernization, guided by the Chinese socialist ideology of Xi Jinping's new era, and guided by the spirit of the 20th and 20th China-China Congresses, and by the serious implementation of the Party's central and State Council's decision-making process. It was determined that the census should be conducted in accordance with the law, that the scientific census should be conducted and that the census should be conducted for the people's census, that it should be carried out in accordance with the law, that it should be carried out in a realistic and innovative manner, and that the “three farmers” of the new era should be thoroughly examined in order to objectively reflect new developments in agricultural development, new aspects of rural construction, new changes in rural life and new effects of rural reform. The Circular states that the Fourth National Agricultural Survey is aimed at rural households in the People ' s Republic of China, including rural agricultural producers and other households; urban agricultural producers; agricultural production units; villagers ' committees; and town and town people ' s governments. The main elements of the census include agricultural production conditions, food and food production, new quality of agricultural productivity, basics of rural development, living conditions of rural residents, etc. The standard time of the census is 2400 hours on 31 December 2026, and the data for the period is annual 2026. items.title: 中央军委主席习近平签署命令 发布《军事设施建设条例》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 中央军委主席习近平日前签署命令，发布《军事设施建设条例》，自2025年8月1日起施行。 条例深入贯彻习近平强军思想，深入贯彻新时代军事战略方针，聚焦服务备战打仗，适应新的领导指挥体制和保障模式，科学规范军事设施建设的基本原则、管理体制、运行机制和工作制度，是军事设施建设工作的重要依据。 条例共11章63条，按照军委管总、战区主战、军种主建的总原则，围绕理顺建设链、管理链、监督链，重点从军事设施建设计划管理、项目审批、工程发包、勘察设计、施工管理、应急建设、安全保密、监督问责等方面，厘清管理权限，优化流程机制，固化实践成果，为提高军事设施建设质量效益和保障能力提供有力法治保障。

translation.title: The President of the Central Military Commission, Xi Jinping, signed an order to issue regulations on the construction of military installations
translation.summary: Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, 5 June The regulations further implement Xi Jinping ' s military doctrine, the strategic military approach of the new era, the focus on service preparation for combat, the adaptation of the new model of command and control, and the scientific regulation of the basic principles of the construction of military facilities, the regulatory framework, the operational mechanisms and the working system, are important bases for the construction of military facilities. In accordance with the general principles of the Military Commission ' s General Administration, the main war zone and military construction, the regulations provide for the clarification of management competencies, the optimization of process mechanisms, the consolidation of practical results and the provision of robust rule of law guarantees for the quality and safety of military facilities, in accordance with the general principles of the Military Commission, chapter 11, section 63, and the streamlining of the construction chain, the management chain and the chain of supervision, with emphasis on the management of the military facilities construction plan, project approval, engineering contracting, survey design, construction management, emergency response, security confidentiality and oversight accountability.

items.title: 丁薛祥在山西调研时强调 守好公平公正“生命线” 确保实现“平安高考”目标

(b) To apply the spirit of reform and strict criteria to govern the party, to ensure that the party group (including the party committee of its nature, together with the other party members) is fully accountable to the party ' s principals, to strengthen the monitoring role of the monitoring and oversight bodies (hereinafter referred to as the accredited bodies) and to promote a culture of discipline and anti-corruption with a strict tone, strict measures and strict atmosphere. Article 3 imposes party disciplinary sanctions on members of the party ' s group management, and the inspection and inspection committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) appointed by the party ' s team, the disciplinary committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) and the accredited body, among others, shall perform their duties in accordance with the established competencies and procedures, enhance coordination and communication, establish an orderly and smooth line of communication and work together to achieve political, disciplinary and social coherence. items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy-saving law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher and higher-quality energy efficiency, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress ' s Standing Committee on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to obtain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection took the form of a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which will be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi, Sichuan and Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing, among others. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a general nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot-checking and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving efforts in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with the law; other issues in the implementation of the law; and suggestions and recommendations for changes to the energy-saving law.
